title: A Woman Commands
director: Paul L. Stein, Harry Joe Brown, Horace Jackson
writer: Guy Fowler, Thilde Förster, Horace Jackson
actors: Pola Negri, Roland Young, Basil Rathbone
plot: Captain Alex Pastitsch falls into huge debts trying to ensure the expensive mistress. When the situation threatened his career, Colonel Stradimirovitsch has an idea how to fix it.
